programme.title: On the Case: The Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: A man's crisis of conscience unravels a decades old mystery behind a young girl's murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Over The Edge
programme.desc: Police are called to the scene of what appears to be a tragic car wreck in the Blue Ridge Mountains... But as Investigators examine the crash site they realize Wendy Kratzert's death was no accident.

programme.title: On the Case: Lying in the Darkness
programme.desc: A jeep swerves off a dark stretch of road and takes the life of a loving mother. But when law enforcement arrives, they discover evidence that the accident wasn't the cause of her death.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, Georgia, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence, they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: September 2nd, 2011. 15-year-old Alyssa Otremba called her mom to ask permission to meet a friend to get a textbook to do her homework. It was late in the afternoon, but her mother believed Alyssa could get the book and be back before dark.

programme.title: On the Case: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: March 17, 1986 in Deerfield Beach, Florida 5- year-old Stacy Savage happily bounded up the street to the spot where her mother Angela Savage and her little brother met her after school. But when Stacy got there, her mother was nowhere to be found

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Errand
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes after stepping out to buy salad dressing, police try to provide answers to her fiancé and family.

programme.title: On the Case: Notes From a Killer
programme.desc: April 1st 1988. It was a cloudy afternoon when 8-year-old April Tinsley left home for a play date. Janet Tinsley never could have imagined that would be the last conversation she would ever have with her beloved daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: No Escape
programme.desc: A young woman's disappearance marks the beginning of a heartbreaking murder mystery. Will a clue discovered by a child be the key to catching his mother's killer?

programme.title: On the Case: One Month of Terror
programme.desc: After abducting a 17 year old girl in front of her home her kidnapper taunts the family with phone calls and disturbing letters. But a tiny mistake will eventually lead police to his door.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: Wednesday, June 1, 2011, police in Platte City, Missouri received an unusual call. A man on his lunch break was walking in a secluded area along the Platte River when he stumbled upon what appeared to be a body submerged in the murky water.

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: Silenced
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman goes missing, police are baffled.

programme.title: On the Case: Clearing the Docket
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning, police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Pelham
programme.desc: A daughter spends 25 years pursuing the truth behind her mother's mysterious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Identical Evidence
programme.desc: Police discover a treasure trove of evidence after teacher Genai Coleman is found murdered in a parking lot, but detectives still face a challenge that may prevent the case from being solved.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 2.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade and Rembrandt (Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) are treated as gods when the Sliders land on an Earth where free love and thinking still exists. Guest star: Jason Gaffney.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on an Earth where being intelligent is more popular than being a famous athlete. Guest stars William B. Davis, Karen Austin and Gabrielle Rose. With John Rhys-Davies.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The travelers slide to a world where Rembrandt "Crying Man" Brown is as huge as Elvis in our world, but after a mysterious "death" eight years ago, this world has had to make do with "Crying Man" impersonators.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders travel to a parallel dimension, which at first glance seems like paradise. Money is given to play the lottery, streets are quiet... it's life in the slow lane and very pleasant.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: On a world where males have been rendered impotent, females eager to repopulate greet the male Sliders as "love gods.''

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Trapped and separated from the other Sliders, Quinn finds himself on an astral plane where only a young girl named Gillian can see or hear him.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn is mistaken for a gunslinger in a world where the code of the Wild West still prevails.
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad, and the Wealthy

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The vengeful and vicious El Sid follows the sliders to a world where San Francisco is a prison facility.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: A world that seems to mirror the previous world the Sliders encountered gives Wade the chance to prevent a series of murders.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn leaves the safety of a cave and faces a man-eating allosaurus in an attempt to retrieve the timer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn must prove something is very wrong when the Sliders return to their own Earth and all become successful.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade's dream man becomes a nightmare when his attention to her becomes obsessive and he tries to prevent her from sliding.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Rembrandt "Crying Man'' Brown becomes the Feds' No. 1 crimebuster in a world where San Francisco is dominated by rival gangster families.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Lewis Daynes
programme.desc: Breck Bednar was a loving, family-oriented 14-year-old who had lots of friends and excelled at school. But he was also seduced by the world of online gaming. He didn’t see the dangers when an older teen made lucrative job offers.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Vincent Tabak
programme.desc: When landscape architect Joanna Yeates disappeared after work Christmas drinks, the nation was gripped by the search for her. Tragedy struck on Christmas day morning when her body was found in a snow-covered lane. But who had killed the young woman

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Cheerleader On Trial
programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder On The Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In Wisconsin Field
programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.title: I Am A Stalker
programme.desc: Convicted stalkers tell in their own words, how love turned into a deadly obsession in face first, captivating in-depth interviews.

programme.title: I Am A Stalker
programme.desc: Convicted stalkers tell in their own words, how love turned into a deadly obsession in face first, captivating in-depth interviews.

programme.title: I Am A Stalker
programme.desc: Convicted stalkers tell in their own words, how love turned into a deadly obsession in face first, captivating in-depth interviews.

programme.title: I Am A Stalker

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: A mysterious creature washed up on a Newfoundland beach, an animal attacking with its claws in New Delhi, and a winged beast haunting Virginia.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On 13 March 1997 in the night sky over Phoenix, Arizona one of the most spectacular mass UFO sighting of all time took place. Thousands witnessed bright orange orbs moving in formation. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Pentagon
programme.desc: The US government officially recognise UFOs, calling them Unidentified Aerial Phenomena. In this episode Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy UAP videos. They speak to an ex-MOD official, Nick Pope. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: SETI
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers at the Pan-STARRS observatory saw something strange in our solar system: an object they named ‘Oumuamua’, the very first observed visitor from interstellar space. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Ancient Oland Island Massacre
programme.desc: On a Swedish island, archaeologists discover a grisly site. The wreckage of an American Navy plane is located in a surprising place. Finnish farmers unearth something shocking. A baby mammoth found in the permafrost is studied.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Secrets Of The Ice Arsenal
programme.desc: An unidentified metal object is found on Kiska Island. A centuries-old gold mining mystery is investigated. In Siberia, a network of ice tunnels is explored. Fossils unearthed in the Canadian Arctic lead to the discovery of a new species of camel.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Mummy Cabin
programme.desc: The remains of an ancient log cabin buried in permafrost are examined. High in the Arctic, a huge metal tower stands alone on the desolate landscape. An odd looking wooden idol is found. Strange sounds are heard emanating from the northern lights.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Hot Spots
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs, where objects return to the skies again and again, as if taunting witnesses below.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Air to Air
programme.desc: Being on an aircraft that comes in close proximity to an object that doesn't appear on radar is a scary experience. Who are they and what do they want?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Achilles Heel. Many believe aliens are already here on Earth. Could they be plotting an attack? And if so, can humans survive their weapons' terrifying capabilities?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Moesha: The Rite Stuff
programme.desc: Moesha wants to boycott her debutante ball when she learns one of the girls is thrown out of the ceremony because she is pregnant.

programme.title: Moesha: I Love Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha is once again rejected from her friends’ band, we enter a black and white parody of I LOVE LUCY wherein Lucy (Moesha) tries to get into Ricky’s show.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Moesha: Not My Pumpkin
programme.desc: Things get tense at the Mitchell house when Frank discovers Moesha has been taking birth control pills – and he’s the last to know.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste
programme.desc: A well-intentioned Moesha intervenes to try and stop her once-popular hangout, The Den, from being sold to a commercial developer, unaware that Andell stands to make a great deal of money on its sale.
programme.sub-title: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?
programme.desc: Hakeem and Moesha’s friendship takes an interesting turn after he surprises her with an expensive necklace to wear to a homecoming dance she’s attending with someone else.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: Moesha: Let’s Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Moesha crashes in Niecy’s dorm room after a late-night Pendulum party and is horrified to discover that Nicey has also let a male sleep in the room.

programme.title: Moesha: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The arrival of Frank’s Aunt Hattie brings a shocking revelation about Frank that turns the rest of the family – especially Dorian and Moesha – against him.

programme.title: Moesha: Color Him Father
programme.desc: Still reeling from the news that Frank is Dorian’s biological father, the Mitchells prepare for Dorian’s 17th birthday bash, a party that grows more and more elaborate and expensive as Dorian takes full advantage of Frank’s guilt.

programme.title: Moesha: Family Affair
programme.desc: Still angry at Frank for keeping his true relationship to Dorian a secret for so long, Moesha decides not to introduce her father at an upcoming 'Businessman of the Year' awards banquet.

programme.title: Moesha: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Hoping to boost the confidence of her new roommate, Theresa, Moesha asks Hakeem’s good-looking friend to ask Theresa on a date – but can’t leave well enough alone when the date is a success.

programme.title: Moesha: Gimme A Break
programme.desc: Moesha, Niecy, and Hakeem go to Santa Barbara for Spring Break. A campus rival spreads false information that Mo is 'easy' when her ex-boyfriend shows interest in Moesha.

programme.title: Moesha: Something About Moesha
programme.desc: Having been neighbors and friends nearly all their lives, Moesha and Hakeem wonder if there is more to their relationship.

programme.title: Moesha: The Robbing Hood
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem explore their evolving dating relationship. Dorian visits Moesha on campus and Moesha sees this as a chance to forge a sister/brother relationship; items begin missing from dorm rooms and all clues lead towards Dorian.

programme.title: Moesha: Arriving Right On Q
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship hits a snag when Q returns to town; sparks fly between Moesha and Q; Q invites Moesha to spend the summer (as a road manager) on tour with his rap group.

programme.title: Moesha: D-Money Loses His Patience
programme.desc: Hakeem tries to convince Moesha to pass on Q’s offer to go on the road with his band, and focus on her priorities: school, family, and him. Moesha admits to being too distracted to make a clear decision.

programme.title: Moesha: On The Rebound
programme.desc: Moesha and Q decide whether or not to take their relationship to the next level; Dorian returns home from boot camp.

programme.title: Moesha: Bad Company
programme.desc: After spending the summer traveling with Q’s band, Moesha returns home sporting an engagement ring.

programme.title: Moesha: Netcam
programme.desc: Someone places a hidden camera in Moesha and Niecy’s dorm room; Myles’ girlfriend tells him she’s pregnant—and he’s the father!

programme.title: Moesha: Living In Paradise
programme.desc: Moesha tries to straighten out her out-of-control roommates, but they’re more interested in chasing Boys II Men.

programme.title: Moesha: You Say He's Just A Friend
programme.desc: Moesha is tempted by her attraction to good-looking Jamal, while Dorian starts up his own hair solon.
programme.sub-title: You Say He's Just A Friend

programme.title: Moesha: Just The Two of Us
programme.desc: While Frank and Dorian are on a road trip to Vegas, Myles falls hard for Moesha’s roommate, Alicia.

programme.title: Moesha: The Nutty Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Halloween and Moesha’s acting crazy, Niecy’s growing body hair, and Dorian’s dogsitting a ferocious bulldog.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Southbank
programme.desc: We have a teenager with an epic budget keen for independence; and a young couple with high hopes that their funds will stretch to the dream flat. Kirstie and Phil are on their home turf –can they secure a famous victory?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield, Windsor Revisits
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies Deborah and Justin Beeley had more stuff than they could cope with while Matt Rushworth's entire life could be squeezed into his well travelled backpack. Could Phil and Kirstie find fitting homes for both of them?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Derbyshire
programme.desc: This week Phil and Kirstie are searching in Derbyshire, where their first couple Bryone & Daniel Burton have moved from London, along with daughter Ruby.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Hertfordshire
programme.desc: Martine Wright and Nick Wiltshire met in 2003 and are getting married in just two months' time.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Sheffield
programme.desc: A year after two troublesome searches, Phil heads back to Sheffield to see how a couple of doctors and a firefighter are faring.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Bucks
programme.desc: With both sets of house hunters determined to have it all, Kirstie and Phil are going to have to use all the tricks of the trade if they're going to help them move forward and hopefully into the house of their dreams!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol & Avon
programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton, Sussex
programme.desc: A first-time buyer after a perfect pad near the Brighton hot spots and a couple who know exactly what they like-and exactly what they don't...

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bath
programme.desc: This week we're back catching up with Sadie Yukon and Simon Gwillian, a picky pair who really put us through the mill.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Norwich
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are called to the rescue of faint-hearted first time buyers, Helen and Paul. Scared off by serious-sounding surveys this hapless pair have loved and lost their dream home no less than three times in the last twelve months.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Jersey
programme.desc: This week we're on Jersey hunting for a fabulous family home for the young couple Nick and Katrina. We show them the many highs and lows this Channel Island has to offer.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Hastings
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit two couples in Hastings, Jakki and Scott, and newlyweds Nicola and Chris, only to find that one couple is now in a very different place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 2: Jersey/Warwickshire
programme.desc: This week we're going back to visit two very different sets of house hunters who had one thing on their minds – space, and they wanted lots of it!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire
programme.desc: One couple want room for 4 children and a 4x4 business -whilst the other want a place that will 'give them a big hug' whenever they walk through the door!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Midlothian
programme.desc: Professional rugby player Matt and girlfriend Amy have been giving the property market a try for over a year but so far, have failed to score.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire & Guildford
programme.desc: After winning one point eight million on the lottery, they needed a new house.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton
programme.desc: Armed with the house-hunters' requirements, laptops and a surgical link to their mobile phones, Kirstie and Phil blitz the market looking for that perfect new place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside
programme.desc: Kirstie's house hunter is London born and bred and has viewed a whopping 90 properties already-whilst Phil's couple have yet to view a single place and have no idea where to buy.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wicklow
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Devon Revisits
programme.desc: Newlyweds Sam and Jamie needed Kirstie's help to start afresh in a new home. Whilst Geoff and Sharon were making the move to Torquay and needed to find a home big enough for them, their kids, and Sharon's mum!

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fair
programme.desc: Sean threatens Dana with blackmail unless she helps him gather incriminating information against the Carrington family; Josh Harris is devastated by Sammy Jo's rejection of his wedding proposal; Fallon asks Jeff for a divorce.

programme.title: Dynasty: The New Moguls
programme.desc: After meeting with Cora Van Husen, Krystle obtains a copy of the scandalous video, proving Blake's innocence; Dex discovers Sean is somehow involved with unsavory characters proposing a multi-million dollar oil venture to Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Spoiler
programme.desc: Following Josh Harris' death, Sammy Jo realizes she must let go of Steven; upset by Steven's uncompromising use of power, Fallon drifts further away from her brother; Dana gives the notes of Denver-Carrington's board meeting to Sean.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Interview
programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.title: Dynasty: Images
programme.desc: Krystle discovers damaging information regarding Alexis' marriage to Cecil Colby, Leslie follows Sean to his father's grave, learning his true identity as Joseph Aynders' son; Dana returns to Adam and the two quietly forget the past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rifle
programme.desc: Forced by Adam and Fallon's vote, Steven reluctantly agrees to authorize the Vitron oil deal, as Sean's maniacal scheme to avenge his father's death begins to unfold; Krystle obtains a copy of Cecil Colby's original will.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bracelet
programme.desc: Encouraged by her popular support after the shooting, Alexis decides to stay in the race; Sean speeds his plan to use the Vitron oil deal to crush Alexis; Karen is unnerved by the return of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Tired of Leslie's threats to expose his true identity, Sean plants a poisonous snake in her room as a warning of who she is dealing with; having second thoughts about accepting Adam's bribe to stay away from Karen, Jesse gives the money back.

programme.title: Dynasty: Adam's Son
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Scandal
programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial
programme.desc: Following the explosion in Natumbre, Blake is accused of dealing in illegal arms; Alexis uncovers proof that Sean paid Jesse to return to Denver so he could persuade Karen to keep Adam's baby.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: Dana tries desperately to convince Adam how much she wants their son. She proposes that if they were a loving couple again, the judge would find in their favor. Still hurting from her outburst in court, Adam is cold to her pleas.

programme.title: Dynasty: Colorado Roulette
programme.desc: Adam is absolved of suspicion in the kidnapping of his son when Leslie calls him to say that Sean has taken the baby and is holding her captive. Adam and Steven hurry to the desolate mountain cabin.

programme.title: Dynasty: Broken Krystle
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Touch of Sable
programme.desc: Sammy Jo and Jeff are relieved when they discover the body found floating in the lake is not Krystle; Blake's fears increase when Krystle's car is found and the man arrested for stealing it is a convicted murder.

programme.title: Dynasty: She's Back
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses, federal they may occur again; As Krystle shakes her head, not recognizing the body; Blake stares with schlock at the familiar faces.

programme.title: Dynasty: Body Trouble
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty: Every Picture Tells a Story
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.45
programme.desc: A woman accuses her former live-in boyfriend of vandalism and skipping out on his share of the rent/Alleged harassment that led to a man’s dismissal at work and a dispute over an unpaid loan land ex-lovers in court.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.233
programme.desc: A man faces a lawsuit for unpaid rent and property damage stemming from a Jacuzzi party, marijuana arrests, and roommate issues. Another man accuses his cousin of violence and property damage after refusing her late-night alcohol run request.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.228
programme.desc: Car salesman sues ex-girlfriend for default on used car sale; she countersues for illegal repossession. Woman's toddlers taken by children's services, blames ex; he and new girlfriend sue for unpaid loan and false allegations.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.48
programme.desc: Man accused of punching lover, sued for allegedly stealing bill money due to gambling habit/Woman uses inheritance to aid brother, demands repayment; he alleges false arrest and refuses payment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.231
programme.desc: A brutal St. Patrick’s Day brawl between ex-lovers sparks a lawsuit. A woman initially denies identity theft accusations but prefers not to involve police in finding the 'real' culprit later.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.212
programme.desc: Ex-friends fight over charges on an allegedly stolen credit card. A man admits that he smashed his ex-girlfriend’s cell phone after reading her texts to another man and claims she is responsible for his belongings being stolen.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.120
programme.desc: A woman and her teen daughter accuse an estranged relative of assaulting them at a family party/A woman is suing her former friend for repossessing her truck; her friend argues that the vehicle was never insured.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.26
programme.desc: Intoxicated bride sues friend for face punch at wedding, accused teen claims self-defense/Woman accuses ex of cheating, he defends as moving on; dispute over living room set balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.31
programme.desc: The emotional burial of a pet Chihuahua leads to a violent, bloody assault between family members/A woman sues her ex-fiancé for a loan to buy a home. He claims she wrecked his truck while driving drunk, so he’s not paying.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls accused of spray painting each other’s cars trace their alleged vandalism back to high school issues. A 'tickling' incident between young lovers causes a shoulder injury and a dispute over treatment costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.114
programme.desc: Man faces assault charges after altercation with son/Ex-fiancé sued for rent and unpaid loans.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.246
programme.desc: Racial slurs and violent threats emerge as a woman and her father sue a family member for incomplete home renovations. Meanwhile, friends swap cell phones, but a defective device complicates the arrangement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.252
programme.desc: Attending a golf tournament becomes a source of contention between ex-lovers when payment for a plane ticket is challenged. When students move out of a shared apartment, their parents are left to fight over rent and damaged credit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.33
programme.desc: Slashed tires, alleged slander on the internet, and a fight over children’s Christmas gifts come into play when ex-lovers end a rocky relationship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.10
programme.desc: Dog breeder accused of misrepresenting breed; teacup Chihuahua weighs over 12 pounds/Underage drinking during basketball damages car, sparks liability dispute.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.39
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute Suzuki motorcycle purchase, crash, and cancelled insurance.Young man arrested for assault, fails drug test, violates probation, bailed out by girlfriend; he claims bailout was birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.154
programme.desc: A man says he was thrown on top of a car by a club bouncer after being wrongfully accused of hitting someone in the bathroom. A woman sues her twin brother for allegedly drinking, driving her car without permission, and wrecking it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.198
programme.desc: A teenager, awarded a scholarship, admits to stealing a phone and erasing contacts. Another teen is accused of urinating in ex-friend's gas tanks as a joke.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.29
programme.desc: Siblings dispute deceased grandmother's estate, personal property, and damages from alleged mutual assault/Woman sues ex-boyfriend for alleged life-threatening phone call over broken apartment lease, involving alleged marijuana and meth use.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.133
programme.desc: Woman sues ex-friend for damaging Pontiac Grand Prix she was selling; ex-friend countersues for car payments. Parents fight over sick child's medication; neighbor testifies helping administer meds.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.227
programme.desc: A lease agreement scrutiny challenges a woman's right to sue ex-tenants for property damage during a fight. A woman sues a former co-worker for loans to bail him out of jail and pay bills.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.172
programme.desc: Man not father of child, sues mother for alleged loans. Jailed vegan seeks bailout due to prison food, friend demands repayment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.106
programme.desc: Former friend sues woman for car accidents and repossessions after buying car in his name/Pool party ends in fight over iPhone ruined when girl pushed into pool.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.224
programme.desc: A teenager denies falsely accusing a woman of assault; she claims the woman and her friends attacked her first.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.124
programme.desc: Man alleges vandalism and gang assault at family party/Man blames ex-girlfriend for inability to repay $9,000 car loan due to cheating and abandonment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.38
programme.desc: Man's jaw broken at party, misses Thanksgiving dinner, sues assailant/Woman sues ex for TV value, unpaid phone bill; he claims TV sold to unreachable friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.155
programme.desc: Man blames ex-girlfriend for loss of business, belongings, and child care. Ex-girlfriend accuses him of assault and theft. Woman tries to access ex-boyfriend's bank account for $5,000 surgery bill reimbursement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.164
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute maxed-out credit card from alleged gambling binge. Daughter sues father convicted of domestic violence for unpaid attorney fees.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.209
programme.desc: A woman’s Chihuahua is killed by her neighbor’s larger dogs; she sues for damages. A teenager accuses her ex-boyfriend of trashing her New Year’s Eve party hotel room; she claims he was hitting on another woman.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.61
programme.desc: A teenager refuses to take a drug test after denying charges that he smashed a car window and stole a neighbor’s belongings/A female nail technician sues a cosmetologist for money allegedly paid toward an apprenticeship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.103
programme.desc: Threats to kill kittens, questionable remarks about a man’s sexuality and inappropriate, drunken toasts after the death of a child come into play when ex-friends fight over alleged vandalism.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.186
programme.desc: A young man denies killing a teen's dog during their graduation party. Intoxicated teenagers prompt neighbors to call police, leading to a dispute over a broken apartment lease between feuding ex-roommates.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.36
programme.desc: Young man admits making payments on dirt bike he claims was a gift from ex-girlfriend/Man accuses 15-year-old of throwing rock at truck on freeway; teenager blames cousin, countersues for harassment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.107
programme.desc: Woman countersues roommate's husband for sexual advances amid back rent lawsuit/Man denies requesting mother's payments on Audi A6 in lawsuit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.23
programme.desc: A man is accused of assaulting his daughter and fracturing her back; she sues him for the cost of medical bills/A Harley Davidson is repossessed and a friendship ends when women fight over late payments on the vehicle.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.203
programme.desc: A Malibu man claiming he was tired of being a “cabana boy” for his older girlfriend is sued for allegedly stealing her tools and making unauthorized charges on her credit card.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.47
programme.desc: A woman’s finger is broken after an argument at a party over alleged cocaine use; she claims she was pushed down the stairs by her roommate/Arrested as a result of bouncing two checks, a man sues a former friend who gave them to him.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.145
programme.desc: Botched football jerseys are the source of contention between fellow team moms who are suing each other for refunds and damages from alleged harassment. A HUD house inspection leads to a conflict between a teenage mother and her ex-roommates.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.168
programme.desc: Woman allegedly destroys sister's TV after affair with ex-boyfriend revealed. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for instigating violence at house party brawl.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.180
programme.desc: A 66-year-old analyst for the U.S. Department of Defense claims he was intimate with a 27-year-old sports bar worker and that she owes him money. She denies his claims.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.185
programme.desc: A woman’s life-long dream to have plastic surgery is fulfilled by her ex-fiancé who demands that he be paid back; a Christmas day fight over child custody further escalates their fight.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.16
programme.desc: An attempt to serve divorce papers to a man and his new girlfriend allegedly ends in an act of vandalism and assault.
