programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Scorpion: Young Hearts Spark Fire
programme.desc: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion's helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Postcards From the Edge
programme.desc: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet to save Walter's life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love
programme.desc: The new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crisis in Jungle City
programme.desc: Alpha Q is not ready to let Earth go without a fight, and sends a group of stealth Terrorcons, named Command Ravage and Blackout.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Kicker Beware
programme.desc: Megatron forces Demolishor to divulge the Autobots' secret of finding energon: Kicker.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Grid
programme.desc: Megatron has taken yet another plan, to create three meteors from Unicron and propel them at Earth before the energon grid has been completed, which he feels will “strike fear in Optimus Prime.”

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Rodimus: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: While Snow Cat tests his power against the Energon Grid by sending frozen asteroids, Megatron decides to go after Alpha Q instead of Earth after finding a Terrorcon spy.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!
programme.desc: Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations
programme.desc: The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity
programme.desc: Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts
programme.desc: Starved for Energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire
programme.desc: As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ripped Up Space
programme.desc: Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime to prove that he is superior to Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Team Optimus Prime
programme.desc: Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Protection
programme.desc: On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Imprisoned Inferno
programme.desc: Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Bulkhead
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet, but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Farewell Inferno
programme.desc: Inferno uses his Decepticon “half” to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crash Course
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Omega Supreme
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Heroic Battle
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Power
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Optimus Supreme
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Perishes
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ambition
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Wishes
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Omega Train
programme.desc: As the Autobots split up, they join with other rebels to find and free the Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Decepticon Army
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunited with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ironhide Team
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. When the Terrorcons entered the super energon, their size grew.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Formidable
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing. When Sixshot overloads the grid, a huge explosion destroys almost all the autobots. Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron Terror
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Destructive Power
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Spark
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs. Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's “puny” remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Sun
programme.desc: Unicron is the “force that drives the universe” and Primus uses the super energon, the autobots band together and give their combination sparks to Optimus, Galvatron wakes/becomes Unicron again.

programme.title: Survivorman: Alaska
programme.desc: As Stroud enters an ocean bay called "Taroka Arm" by sea kayak, there's only about four hours of twilight per day and he knows that Mother Nature is going to wreak havoc upon his internal clock.

programme.title: Survivorman: Amazon
programme.desc: After brushing up on wilderness and hunting tactics from the skilled Waorani tribe, Les will have to survive on next to nothing while capturing it all with the camera equipment he lugs around.

programme.title: Survivorman: Kalahari
programme.desc: Les has his work cut out for him surviving in the scorching red sands of the Kalahari Desert. With only enough water for four days, Les mimics the Bushmen and sits still in the shade during daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Labrador
programme.desc: Dog sledding is the way Les will get around the freezing north. Even though he brought along a survival kit, he is still without the crucial essentials needed to survive Labrador in the winter.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Sierra Nevada Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Les finds himself in the predicament of a lost hiker. Travelling with a typical "day hiker" pack – only provisions for an overnight stay – Les needs to make the most of what he's brought with him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Colorado Rockies
programme.desc: Out for a casual day's ride, Les (and horses) have to survive temperatures that vary from 70°F in the day to snow flurries at night.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survival Challenge
programme.desc: Les takes a group of NHL hockey players out to the wilderness to see if they have what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: Argentina
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to the Mitre Peninsula, a remote peninsula located on the easternmost tip of Isla Grande in the province of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les pits his jungle survival skills against the incredibly diverse mountain jungle terrain of Grenada's largest active mountain, Mt. St. Catherine.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hunting in Temagami
programme.desc: After all his years of wilderness survival, the forests of Ontario's Temagami still rank as some of the most difficult, harrowing and challenging survival experiences Les has ever faced.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Tofino
programme.desc: Les and his 16-year-old son Logan find themselves trapped without supplies and without a way home while sea kayaking along the coastline of British Columbia.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Wabakimi
programme.desc: Les and Logan set out for a fishing trip in a tin boat. Stranded after their motor dies, Les and Logan are quickly plunged into an intense survival situation that could happen to any summer cottager.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tiburon Mexico Part 1
programme.desc: Les Stroud is shipwrecked on the desert island of Tiburon. He must distill seawater and scavenge for clams and oysters amongst the rocks and mud to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tiburon Mexico Part 2
programme.desc: Les Stroud is shipwrecked on the desert island of Tiburon. After 5 days of surviving on the shore, he treks in-land in search of food, water and shelter.

programme.title: Survivorman: Norway Part 1
programme.desc: Les strands himself in the Norwegian mountains to survive for ten days taking little food, and no water or gear. Does Les stay with his marooned car or push on to find help?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A TV news producer is murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of wrongdoing. Can a DNA data bank help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to a shooting and discover the dead victim's husband is one of their own. Did the policeman's wife accidentally shoot herself in the head?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of her prescribed drugs. Did she die of natural causes or was it a case of murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine near a jogging path. Crucial crime scene evidence had been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Can detectives catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl's body is discovered ten days after she disappears, police mount a search for a killer. Can evidence at the crime scene help catch a suspect?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Can police nail the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Follow the six year story of a killer who prowled New York. He wrote letters to the police declaring he would kill 12 people, one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep, toxicology tests reveal that it may have been foul play. Could a `suicide note' hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Could a diary, found years after the murder, help solve this tragic case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is discovered murdered in his bed, his wife claims it's suicide. Could a tape from a bank surveillance camera prove otherwise?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nursing student goes missing, investigators find her car, which contains the key to an unknown location that could provide important clues.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mask is discovered near the crime scene and police are hoping that it will lead to the killer of a funeral director.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A meticulous killer leaves behind just one hair, but three years later that one hair links the crimes.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After the discovery of the brutal murder of an 18-year-old desk clerk of a beachfront condo, analysts use brand-new mitochondrial DNA technology to prove the killer's identity.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 33-year-old West Virginia husband and father seemingly dies in an accidental house fire. But a closer look at the scene reveals a more sinister case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An upscale apparel store in Bethesda, Md., is the site of a gruesome scene when an employee is killed and her coworker is battered and tied up, but surveillance video and blood evidence shed further light on the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young mother is found murdered in her home and there are two suspects with ample motive, but an unusual interview and security camera footage have investigators puzzled.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of Helle Crafts led to the murder conviction of her husband.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators use blood evidence to convict a man of murdering his wife.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Scientists and detectives use DNA to solve a string of rapes and murders.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police in Arizona ask a molecular geneticist to pick out a tree in a `lineup' when unidentified seed pods are found in a suspect's truck. The judge rules into evidence DNA profiles linking the pods to a tree near where the body was found.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police thought they had a serial rapist and murderer, but DNA testing and research led to another arrest and conviction.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Alabama woman discovers her husband brutally murdered in their home, but differing interpretations of the physical evidence muddle the legal case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Insects are sometimes used to determine the time of a person's death when traditional techniques fail.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Art and science combine in this episode as an artist and sculptor works with a forensic psychologist to develop a profile of an ageing murderer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Autopsies reveal that a string of unexplained deaths in Omaha resulted from poison-induced liver disintegration.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a human skull is unearthed at a Boy Scout camp, investigators use facial reconstruction to identify the victim and her killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The 1984 rape of a young Virginia woman is revisited by the experts when DNA testing refutes her ID of the rapist and calls everything into question.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, police believe it's no accident. Can a pinprick of blood help to convict a killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Will a discarded sweet wrapper and a few tiny seeds be enough to help forensic scientists discover the identity of a callous murderer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car, police suspect he may have been murdered. Can a renowned forensic anthropologist uncover the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, killing a young man and seriously injuring his mother, detectives hope that the remnants of a mailing label will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A quiet residential community, shattered by the murder of a neighbour. See how modern techniques helped investigators catch the culprit in less than 12 hours.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bruce Miller was shot to death in his office. The crime scene was clean of fingerprints and hairs, with no trace fibres. Could computer forensics help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is murdered in a drive-by shooting. When a mobile phone trace incriminates a killer, it's up to a forensic geologist to find evidence that he was at the scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead, her boyfriend confesses to her murder. However, in a strange twist, so does another man. Who was telling the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a high school gym teacher went missing, investigators suspected foul play. With no body, could the case be cracked with the help of forensic science?

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Justice
programme.desc: This week, a five year old poacher case comes to a close and a grizzly bear has wardens on full alert. Then, wardens converge on Helena for their annual convention where they have a little fun.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wildfire
programme.desc: This week on Wardens, we're tracking down a pesky bear who has been digging through the neighbors trash. In another region, we're citing several people for fishing without a license.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Trespass
programme.desc: This week, Montana Game Wardens are on the lookout for illegal hunters, some by trespassing, others by hunting too early in the day, hunting from vehicles, or taking spike elk.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Summer Recreation
programme.desc: This week, we're near Seeley Lake, Montana, as the wardens from Region 2 are kept busy with the summer recreation crowd.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rocky Mountain Front
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are kept busy during hunting season as they're out catching poachers with an elk decoy, tracking down trespassers, and checking tags.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Check Point
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Cons to Icons
programme.desc: In the final episode, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media’s influence on creating celebrities out of criminals. Is it possible to create a gangland persona based purely on false headlines? Yes, but there are certain to be consequences...

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Glasgow
programme.desc: Bernard O’Mahoney begins his journey in Glasgow. Bernie meets the city’s first Godfather of crime, Walter Noval, former leader of the XYY gang, who discussed Glasgow’s underworld during the 1950s and ‘60s.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: London
programme.desc: With a history rich in criminal activity, England's capital gives Bernie the chance to meet numerous 'faces' that have shaped London's colourful past, as well as present day names.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Newcastle
programme.desc: Tyneside's gangland capital was immortalised in the Michael Caine film Get Carter, based on the life of Dennis Stafford. Bernie meets Stafford, who talks of Newcastle's past.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Your Money or Your Life?
programme.desc: The 70s and 80s saw a change in activity for criminal fraternities. Following the sentencing of the Krays, many gangs turned to armed robbery. Villains saw the banks and armoured cars that transported huge amounts of cash as relatively easy pickings.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Goodfellas?
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Bernie attempts to answer the age old question: "Does crime pay?" For many 'faces,' the initial thrill of fast money and high rewards leads to decades of violence, prison life, personal destruction and loss of life.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Liverpool
programme.desc: The famous port's wealthy history has inextricably contributed to its prosperous underworld, wherein the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Crow Creek
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens saddle up for a back country patrol in search of poachers while other wardens are busy with other illegal hunters and anglers, not to mention an elderly man who is feeding deer he shouldn't be.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Whitefish
programme.desc: This week, wardens come across a gruesome crime involving deer poachers as well as some illegal fishing activity. They also say goodbye to one of their own, as Captain Jeff Darrah retires from duty after 26 years on the job.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation White Sulpher
programme.desc: This week, wardens deal with conflicting hunting stories which leads one man into trouble. Meanwhile, other wardens deal with would-be trespassers as the hunting season comes to a close.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Wardens: Antler Raiders
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens try to control the masses as the gates open and antler hunters are set free to find their trophies.

programme.title: Wardens: Across The Seeded Fields
programme.desc: Montana game wardens work the opening day of pronghorn season as they monitor legal and illegal hunting practices, as well as protecting the seeded fields from undue harm.

programme.title: Apocalypse Pompeii
programme.desc: When a Former Special Ops commando visits Pompeii, his family is trapped as Mt. Vesuvius erupts with massive force. While his family fights to survive, he enlists his former teammates in a daring operation beneath the ruins of Pompeii.

programme.title: 2012: Ice Age
programme.desc: When a volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier hurtling toward North America, a family struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to prove his theory that a series of unexplained catastrophes are the result of powerful winds found in the upper atmosphere coming down to ground level.

programme.title: 100 Below Zero
programme.desc: When a chain of volcanic eruptions rips through Europe, the enormous ash cloud blocks out the sun, plunging the continent into a new ice age. An American couple must find their college-aged kids and get them out of Paris before it freezes over.

programme.title: San Andreas Mega Quake
programme.desc: Scientists make a horrible discovery: The 'Big One' is coming in two days, with it, California will sink to the ocean. Their only hope is to rupture a volcano that will displace the earthquake's energy and build a new crust on the surface.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: San Andreas Quake
programme.desc: When a discredited L.A. Seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake, no one takes her seriously. Now on her own, she races desperately to get her family to safety before the earthquake breaks Los Angeles apart from the mainland.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: 2012: Doomsday
programme.desc: Four strangers on a journey of faith are drawn to a temple in the heart of Mexico on December 21, 2012. For the Mayans it is the last recorded day. For NASA scientists it is a cataclysmic polar shift. For the rest of us, it is Doomsday.

programme.title: Ice Part I
programme.desc: The destructive effects of global warming cause unimaginable devastation and panic worldwide in this post-apocalyptic disaster film starring A-list cast- Richard Roxburgh (Hacksaw Ridge) and Sam Neil (Jurassic Park).

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: Powered by an artificial heart, Chev Chelios (Jason Statham) embarks on a frantic chase through Los Angeles to find the thief who stole his own, nearly indestructible, one.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: Powered by an artificial heart, Chev Chelios (Jason Statham) embarks on a frantic chase through Los Angeles to find the thief who stole his own, nearly indestructible, one.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: A resourceful teen takes her younger sister's place in a brutal contest in which youths from each of 12 districts fight to the death on live television.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After their unprecedented victory in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark embark on a Victors Tour. Katniss senses rebellion is stirring, but a cruel change in the upcoming 75th Hunger Games may change Panem forever.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Derek Lloyd go to the Peruvian jungle to look for the Paracelsus scrolls which contain the formula for turning lead into gold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Flag Day
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Larivee, California to find the Pioneer's Bear Flag.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Emperor's Bride
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Moose Bay, Alaska looking for the white jade sarcophagus of a Chinese Empress. Sydney runs into fellow relic hunters Dallas Carter and Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and rival relic hunter Kurt Reiner attempt to find the lost baseball glove of Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Everyone who steals a statue that represents the Egyptian cat-goddess Mafdet is killed. Now, the statue has disappeared and Sidney and Nigel are tasked with retrieving it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible, a wooden launch boat, and look at a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys turns Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96. Despite a stunning restoration, it could result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics

programme.title: Smoke & Steel
programme.desc: Examining HMS Warrior, an ironclad warship, now a museum, that is located in Portsmouth on the south coast of England. Plus, a grand public works facility in Prague and the mint building in San Francisco.

programme.title: Smoke & Steel
programme.desc: A look at the Thames Tunnel, built in 1825 and designed by Marc Brunel. The tunnel was the first to be built under a river, a gigantic undertaking that had never previously succeeded, and cost six lives.

programme.title: Smoke & Steel
programme.desc: Explore the past history of how a mill in Manchester birthed a revolution in the world of work - the factory. Plus, the stories of a bridge in St Louis and a vast hangar in Brazil.

programme.title: Smoke & Steel
programme.desc: Examining the legacy of a cable hut in Cornwall, how a mountain railway in New Hampshire inspired its passengers and a lighthouse in France.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: Following a dedicated team of craftspeople as they work to complete a 5-year, £25 million project to restore Canterbury Cathedral to its former glory. As the seat of the Arch Bishop of Canterbury it is of huge importance to the Anglican Church.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: The team build a Protection Deck; more then 300km of scaffolding cover the whole bridge, encasing it in an exoskeleton of constantly changing steel.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A woman has the worst nose bleed the ambulance crew have ever seen, and both a mum and her son need treatment.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crew fight to restart a man's heart after he had a cardiac arrest and crashed the van he was driving. Elsewhere, a young woman is need of help following a series of severe stomach cramps.

programme.desc: Paramedics desperately try to save a patient whose heart has stopped for more than 15 minutes. Elsewhere, a pregnant woman struggles to breath and a young lad has a deep cut in his hand.

programme.desc: Medics treat a man who appears to be having a heart attack and needs to be taken to hospital right away. Meanwhile, crew also help a man who got so confused he came home early from his holiday.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The death of an innocent mother and how detectives identified her killer and proved his guilt.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8 day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Fridge Killer follows the investigation into a truly spine-chilling murder in Nevada, that led police to uncover a serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The 36 year investigation into Virginia Freeman's murder and the forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Covering the 38-year investigation into Jeannie Moore's murder.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the brutal and senseless murder of Sandra Rozzo. Attempting to understand how and why she died, and how determined police work and forensic science eventually crack the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Chickenlover
programme.desc: Chicken-Lover: When Barbrady calls the boys in to help solve the case of the notorious, perverted Chicken-Lover, Cartman gets a little carried away with his new-found 'authoritah'. (S2, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: The Mexican Staring Frog Of Southern Sri Lanka: After being duped by Stan's Uncle Jimbo, the boys decide to take revenge by making bogus videos of a certain frog. Will Jesus stand for this? (S2, E06)
programme.sub-title: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)
programme.sub-title: City on the Edge of Forever

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Chickenpox
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)
programme.sub-title: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Spooky Fish
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Merry Christmas Charlie Manson
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Spontaneous Combustion
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap. Let the trials begin!

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The small but mighty Storm II takes on Mayhem, Rhino and Supernova in round one, as Mayhem fights its first battle. Team Steel Avenger named the heat, the Heat of Doom as it includes Supernova, Shredder Evolution and Storm II.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Thermidor 2 and Kronic the Wedgehog meet again in a replay of another heat. Thermidor 2 puts up an impressive fight as it takes down every robot in its path.

programme.title: Robot Wars World Series
programme.desc: Former champions Apollo, Sabretooth, Terrorhurtz and Gabriel 2 take on a true legend, the highly flammable Diotoir. Making up the Rest of the World team are TMWHK from the Netherlands, Cobra from Belgium and Rabid M8 from Portugal.

programme.title: Robot Wars World Series
programme.desc: Reigning champions Eruption lead a team of some of the fiercest robots in the UK, Big Nipper, Concussion and Thor all fighting for international glory. Their opposition are captained by silicon valley millionaire Michael Mauldin and robot Cathadh.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The competition begins with the first heat, with new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The second heat of the competition takes the action to Crawley in the south of England. Winners and losers from Heat One face fresh opponents, fighting to secure a win and guarantee their place in the finals.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: It is the last chance for teams to secure a spot before the final as they clash in one-on-one matches for a place in the top 16. New robots join the fray, hoping for a last-minute victory to advance to the championship.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The most battle-hardened combat robots in the UK compete in the MechMania Grand Final. After three heats, the tournament switches to a one-on-one sudden-death format until one team emerges as the victor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars World Series
programme.desc: Former champions Apollo, Sabretooth, Terrorhurtz and Gabriel 2 take on a true legend, the highly flammable Diotoir. Making up the Rest of the World team are TMWHK from the Netherlands, Cobra from Belgium and Rabid M8 from Portugal.

programme.title: Robot Wars World Series
programme.desc: Reigning champions Eruption lead a team of some of the fiercest robots in the UK, Big Nipper, Concussion and Thor all fighting for international glory. Their opposition are captained by silicon valley millionaire Michael Mauldin and robot Cathadh.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The competition begins with the first heat, with new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kari and Boris
programme.desc: Avid video gamers Boris and Kari are expecting a baby so it’s time for better digs. But with their tiny condo already rented out, time is ticking. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephane and Karina
programme.desc: Stephan and Karina have moved 12 times in 15 years and their kids, Samuel and Alicia, have had enough! Tired of renting and renovations, the doting parents promise to set down roots in a super-stylish modern home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Christa and Sumit
programme.desc: Christa and Sumit have reached their limit and want to flee from their cramped townhouse into a large free-flowing home with all the modern fixings. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nancy and Rhonda
programme.desc: Nancy and Rhonda are both eager to move away from cramped city living into a serene and stylish home, but the power couple needs tons of space to make it work. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly space

programme.title: Property Brothers: Veronica and Andrew
programme.desc: Veronica and Andrew have had it with their cramped condo. With Veronica’s maternity leave coming to an end, the clock is ticking to find the perfect home in which to raise their young family. The Property Brothers help.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Maria & Dave
programme.desc: After six months of hotel living with their dog and two sons, Maria and stay-at-home dad Dave are feeling the squeeze. Fed up with their cramped quarters, they’re finally ready to find a sprawling suburban home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Franklin & Heather
programme.desc: Tired of living in their cramped condo, Franklin and Heather are hoping to find a sprawling move-in ready home where they can entertain in style. However, their wish list is way out of step with their budget.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Edith & Fred
programme.desc: Edith and Fred have been living with their son, and it’s high time to move on. The couple has big dreams for their next home, and they’re determined to find a resort-style oasis where they can live large and entertain.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Melissa & Joe
programme.desc: With their two small children, Melissa and Joe outgrew the family home, so they sold the property and moved in with her parents. But now they’re even more cramped for space than before.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandy & Susy
programme.desc: With an empty nest and a new lease on life, Sandy is looking to live it up in an urban pad of her own. And she’s enlisted her identical twin sister and best friend Susy to help her find the perfect downtown property.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Chris & Mike
programme.desc: After years of sharing a tiny pool house in their parents’ backyard, brothers Chris and Mike have saved up a tidy nest egg and are ready to break out on their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Beatriz & Brandon
programme.desc: With busy careers and an active lifestyle, Beatriz and Brandon have outgrown their cramped condo. But they’re ready to give up on their frustrating house hunt too, because after a series of unsuccessful offers.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Luca, Anne & Barbara
programme.desc: Ready to take their relationship to the next level, Anne and Luca are looking for a budget dream home in the city. And while they agree on steering clear of the suburbs, their styles are miles apart.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nicole & Colby
programme.desc: Nicole and Colby are hoping to find a picture-perfect dog-friendly home where they can put down roots and start a family. In the meantime, they’re squatting at a friend’s place and concerned they may never find a home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nadine & Greg
programme.desc: With busy careers, three kids and another one on the way, Nadine and Greg have a hectic schedule. And now that he’s battling cancer, they’re more focused on family than ever before. They’ve outgrown their current nest.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Done living in his parents’ cramped basement, newlyweds Stephanie and David are on the hunt for their forever home. They know exactly what they want, but unfortunately their long wish list is beyond their budget.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dionna & Natasha
programme.desc: A full-time teacher, student, and single mom, Dionna dreams of providing the best home possible for her young son. They’ve definitely outgrown her tiny apartment.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Aven and Philip
programme.desc: Engaged and taking on a host of major challenges, Aven and Phillip are ready to put down roots after recently relocating to his hometown. And in addition they are planning their wedding and starting a new business.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Belinda & Tiago
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-weds Belinda and Tiago are determined to move out of their respective parents’ homes. And the sooner they find a suburban dream property of their own, the sooner they’ll be able to start their lives together.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Love Curse
programme.desc: When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: Soon after Randy recites an incantation from a book on witchcraft, a growling monster appears.

programme.title: A Haunting: House Of Sorrows
programme.desc: In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: Tammy Shea, a single mother of three, relocates her family for a fresh start but her dream turns to a nightmare when her family is antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate, Tammy finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Possessed
programme.desc: Mary Vogel, a spiritual counselor for ten years, has a run in with a demonic force.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway To Evil
programme.desc: Devastated by a friend’s murder, Julisa holds a séance to communicate one last time--and unwittingly invites a dark spirit into her home…and her life. Julisa and her mother believe that she has re-ignited the evil that plagued her mother years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A family begins renovating their new house, unaware of a ghostly inhabitant that hates change.

programme.title: A Haunting: Marked By Evil
programme.desc: When Stephanie Winters rejects the advances of a friend, he steals a piece of her hair and threatens to put a spell on her. Soon after, Stephanie notices strange noises and objects moving on their own. Could Stephanie's friend have conjured a demon?

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
programme.desc: Bonnie and her family buy a farmhouse and they sense that they are being watched.
