programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie travel to Scotland to fulfil Jack's special wish for a football shirt. Although Jack is a substitute on his team, he hopes to be on the next game against a famous team.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy in Hawaii orders a special vacuum to clean up the garbage he's found in a bay where he rescued a young sea turtle. Before releasing the turtle back to the wild, the boy wants to be sure the bay is garbage-free.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett's friend from Japan, Namiko, orders enormous sheets of origami paper. She and her friends Yuki, Masako and Haru use them to build a cosplay version of the Jumbo Roboto for the Paper Rangers fan convention.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie fly to Mongolia to give Gaspard a set of special tyres. In fact, the camper van in which the boy and his father are travelling has run aground in the sand of the Gobi Desert.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy fly to Nepal to give Akash and Remi a giant drawing kit. The two little brothers want to make a big banner to wish their dad good luck.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: All the Super Wings join forces to prevent the out-of-control Aircraft from overwhelming a village at the foot of the valley.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks the Super Wings for a spray- painting drone to help her take part in a mural contest.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie travel to Germany to bring a long wig to a girl named Kirsten.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Switzerland orders an early release copy of a new book by a teenage adventure author.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Pavel whose hobby is repairing watches, orders a special Super Wings wristwatch.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a boy and his grandmother board a luxury train in South Africa with self-inflating balloons everyone gets a very different ride than they imagined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Kate from Bunbury, Australia, asks the SWs for a scanner for reading someone's health and emotions that can go underwater.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On Halloween, a boy in California orders his own fully-functional Super Wings costume.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Paul fly to Cairo, where a girl has ordered a special item to help her lead to lead a tour of the Cairo Museum for a group of her friends.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Two boys who are pals that live in Greece are huge mythology fans.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who loves everything about wizards is going to a day camp in a castle that's set up like a wizard school.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A father orders an adventure uniform for his son Avelino so he can see there is more action in the outside world than in his video games.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Chinese New Year, a girl named Siuwan orders extra long glowing dragon dance costume. However, when her family is unable to meet for the dance, Jett calls for the deployment of the Super Wings to save the family's New Year celebrations.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku fights Goku Black and Zamasu, but slowly loses ground, Zamsu pushes Trunks over the edge.
programme.sub-title: Zamasu's Ambition: The Dreadful Tale of the Zero Mortal Plan

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fighting rages on and things are looking grim for the heroes, they might not be able to win, but Future Trunks can at least defend the others while they escape.
programme.sub-title: I'll Defend the World! Trunks' Furious Super Power Explodes!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With Majin Buu defeated, Goku has taken a completely new role as a farmer. Now, with Earth at peace, our heroes have settled into normal lives.
programme.sub-title: Don't Dishonour Saiyan Cells! Vegeta's Heroic Battle Begins!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku Black realises he can harness his anger to become more powerful. Zamazu is shocked by Goku Black's power display.
programme.sub-title: Revere Him! Praise Him! Fusion Zamasu's Explosive Birth!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta and Trunks combine forces to save Earth from Zamasu's devastating attack, Mai and Bulma hurry to repair the time machine.
programme.sub-title: Is This the Final Judgment!? The Absolute God's Ultimate Power

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Merged Zamasu's immortality is limited, Vegeta and Goku ask the Supreme Kais for help, their combined strength tries to prevail over such a significant threat.
programme.sub-title: Showdown! The Miraculous Power of the Warriors Who Won't Give Up

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: It's been six months since Son Goku and Vegeta defeated the dangerous Majin Buu in a terrible clash. Thanks to Dragon Balls, the people on the Earth do not remember what happened. Peace has returned to Earth.
programme.sub-title: The World Peace Prize. Who is Getting 100 Million Zeni?!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta had promised Trunks to take him to the theme park. In the end, the whole family happily goes on a day trip. But Vegeta isn't so thrilled, he would have preferred to train to keep up with Goku.
programme.sub-title: To the Promised Vacation! Vegeta Goes on a Family Trip?!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fearing what might happen knowing that the God of Destruction is awake, the Old Supreme Kai and Supreme Kai urge King Kai to ensure that Goku never finds out about Beerus.
programme.sub-title: Where Does the Dream Pick Up? Find the Super Saiyan God!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With all guests now gathered except for Goku and Vegeta, Bulma's birthday party gets underway. Trunks shows Goten where his mother hid the bingo tournament grand prize, the Dragon Balls.
programme.sub-title: Bid for the Dragon Balls! Pilaf and Crew's Impossible Mission!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Beerus tracks Goku's energy to King Kai's planet and comes face to face with the Saiyan. Beerus accepts Goku's challenge to fight, but Goku's most powerful attacks prove insignificant against the mighty god.
programme.sub-title: Goku vs God of Destruction Beerus

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: When new threats endanger Earth, the world's greatest warriors take their abilities to the next level as rival Saiyans Goku and Vegeta discover new powers with the help of Beerus, the god of destruction, and Whis, his wise guru.
programme.sub-title: Don't Anger the God of Destruction! Excitement at the Birthday Party

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: When Buu can't land a hit on Beerus, Trunks and Goten fuse into Gotenks and the other fighters charge into the fray to prevent the god from destroying Earth. A smack in the face from an unexpected source brings the tension to a critical point.
programme.sub-title: How Dare You Do That to My Bulma! Vegeta's Metamorphosis of Fury?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With a surge of power, Vegeta attacks Beerus; Beerus challenges Oolong to rock-paper-scissors to give Earth a second chance.
programme.sub-title: Goku Arrives! A Last Chance from Beerus Sama?!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After learning how to create the legendary Super Saiyan God, everyone realises that the transformation will require one more Saiyan than they have available, and now they need to figure out a solution.
programme.sub-title: Sorry for the Wait, Beerus Sama. Super Saiyan God Is Finally Born!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Holding the powers of a Super Saiyan God, Goku tries to face Beerus; Goku proves to be a true challenge, forcing the god to take him seriously.
programme.sub-title: Show Us, Goku! The Power of a Super Saiyan God!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Seemingly in control of his powers, Goku escalates the battle. Beerus' power does not fade, and he continues to hit Goku.
programme.sub-title: Let's Keep Going, Lord Beerus! The Battle of Gods!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: When new threats endanger Earth, the world's greatest warriors take their abilities to the next level as rival Saiyans Goku and Vegeta discover new powers with the help of Beerus, the god of destruction, and Whis, his wise guru.
programme.sub-title: The Universe Crumbles?! Clash! God of Destruction vs. Super Saiyan God

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The clash between Beerus and Goku nearly demolishes Earth, but the destroyer's energy cancels out Goku's attack and reduces Goku to a normal Super Saiyan.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku continues the battle, but he lacks enough power to defeat the God of Destruction, and his energy runs out.
programme.sub-title: This Is Every Ounce of Power I Have! The Battle of Gods' Conclusion!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With the world at peace, the Z Fighters resume their normal lives. Aliens arrive on Earth to thank and challenge the hero who fought Beerus.
programme.sub-title: Valiant Hercule, Work a Miracle! A Challenge from Outer Space

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: When Vegeta finds Whis having lunch with Bulma, he demands to be taken to Beerus. Whis reveals himself to be the god's teacher.
programme.sub-title: Vegeta Becomes a Pupil?! Take Down Whis!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Gohan's daughter is born, and Chi-Chi refuses to let her become a martial artist. Bulma reveals where Vegeta has been training.
programme.sub-title: Pan Is Born! And Goku Goes on a Training Journey?!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku arrives on Beerus' planet to start training and marvels at Vegeta's growing strength. Goku must complete chores with Vegeta before training can begin.
programme.sub-title: I Have Come Too! Training Begins on Beerus' Planet!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The remaining members of the Frieza Force seek revenge for their fallen leader. Goku and Vegeta train, and Sorbet and his men head to Earth in search of the Dragon Balls and a way to bring back Frieza.
programme.sub-title: Despair Once Again! Resurrection of the Evil Emperor Freeza!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Frieza plans his revenge against Goku and Earth, but when he learns how strong Goku has become, he begins training.
programme.sub-title: A Warning From Jaco! Frieza and 1,000 Soldiers Close In

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Frieza and his army arrive on Earth, annoyed at Goku's absence, so Frieza attacks Earthlings. Goku and Vegeta continue training under Whis.
programme.sub-title: The Start of Vengeance! The Frieza Force's Malice Strikes Gohan!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Piccolo is amazed by Tagoma's power. Krillin says that he's on a different level than the other soldiers they've fought. Tagoma accidentally sets off Ginyu's signature move, then they swap bodies, and Ginyu must adapt to his new body's power.
programme.sub-title: Change! Impossible Resurrection! The Name is Ginyu!!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Whis retrieves Goku and Vegeta, and upon learning that Frieza was revived, Goku searches for energy to perform instant transmission to get back to Earth quickly.
programme.sub-title: Earth! Gohan! Both on the Ropes! Hurry and Get Here, Goku!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The fight between Goku and Frieza begins, but when the fight becomes too evenly matched, Frieza resorts to attacking others to distract Goku.
programme.sub-title: Clash! Frieza vs. Goku - This Is the Result of My Training!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The fight between Goku and Frieza begins, but when the fight becomes too evenly matched, Frieza resorts to attacking others to distract Goku.
programme.sub-title: Clash! Frieza vs. Goku - This Is the Result of My Training!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Frieza assumes a new golden form, gaining enough power to potentially defeat Goku. Beerus and Whis run into their counterparts from another universe on their way to Earth.
programme.sub-title: A Full-Throttle Battle! The Vengeful Golden Frieza

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta refuses to come to Goku's aid as Frieza pummels him mercilessly. A weakness in Frieza's golden form soon becomes apparent to the Saiyans.
programme.sub-title: A Chance Appears in a Tight Spot! Launch a Counteroffensive, Goku!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Faced with diminishing power in a battle against two Saiyans, Frieza resorts to a final, desperate tactic -- destroying Earth itself.
programme.sub-title: The Earth Explodes? A Decisive Kamehameha!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion occurs on Beerus' planet. Beerus' twin brother Champa has come to mock Beerus by boasting about Universe Six's delicious food. Champa challenges Beerus to a universe v universe tournament.
programme.sub-title: The God of Destruction of 6th Universe: His Name is Champa

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: In Beerus' castle, Champa decides that the tournament should be held on the Nameless Planet, Bulma suggests summoning Shenron to find the remaining Super Dragon Balls, and a new member to the team rivals Goku's strength.
programme.sub-title: It is Settled : We Are Holding a Martial Arts Match! The Team Captain is Even Stronger Than Goku

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Vegeta search for two worthy members to join the team to fill out its ranks, allowing them to participate in the tournament, but it is unclear who will be worthy to face the Sixth Universe alongside them.
programme.sub-title: Training for the Martial Arts Tournament : Who Are the Two Remaining Members?!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Jaco takes Bulma to the all-knowing alien, Master Zuno, to learn more about the Super Dragon Balls; Jaco and Bulma run across an intergalactic criminal and take him down.
programme.sub-title: Off to See Master Zuno! Find Out Where the Super Dragon Balls Are!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to head to the tournament, but Goku and Vegeta hold things up by arriving late from training. Once on the `Planet With No Name', the fighters size up their competition, which includes a Saiyan from Universe Six.
programme.sub-title: The Match Begins! Everyone, Head to the Nameless Planet!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Botamo kick off their match and Botamo displays a surprising resilience to Goku's attacks; Goku faces his next opponent, Frost, a close doppelganger of his universe's Frieza.
programme.sub-title: Surprise, 6th Universe! This Is Super Saiyan Goku!

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Kasumi of the Mist Capitol
programme.desc: The suitcase with Tetsuro and Maetel's passes is stolen. However, the thief collapses while making their escape.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part One
programme.desc: Maetel is abducted by the Chief as soon as they arrive at the Spherical Housing Complex, a complex of spherical houses.
programme.sub-title: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part Two
programme.desc: Within the Chief's castle Tetsuro learns of some sort of secret and sees Maetel being subservient to the Chief.
programme.sub-title: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Female's Memories
programme.desc: As they approach the station, the Face of Memories, a woman passenger named Female causes a disturbance on the train and derails the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Kira of Storm Hill, Arashigaoka
programme.desc: Tetsuro has his pass stolen on a planet where the wind never stops blowing. Tetsuro believes the thief to be a young man named Kira but Kira denies any wrongdoing.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part One
programme.desc: At Deadwood Mountain, a young man named Prider arrived on a train in order to make money for his girlfriend Alice by music.
programme.sub-title: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro, haven been taken aboard the Valkyrie's mothership, tries to escape. Prider tries to defend Tetsuro and is stabbed by the Valkyries.
programme.sub-title: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: El Alameins Singing Voice
programme.desc: Maetel, Nanmi, and Tetsuro go down to an ancient battlefield. Fully automated tanks which activate when they detect the presence of life have been left behind there

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Laboratory of Eternal War Part One
programme.desc: On a planet where war is considered a tourist attraction, the 999 stops and the passengers eat dinner while watching people actually in battle.
programme.sub-title: The Laboratory of Eternal War Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Laboratory of Eternal War Part Two
programme.desc: Zeda is convinced to join a rebel militia by a female soldier named Santana and they set off to not fight as a tourist attraction, but to do battle with the leader of the planet.
programme.sub-title: The Laboratory of Eternal War Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Future Planet
programme.desc: Tetsuro and the gang go to a planet full of industrious people. A planet that, although poor, is brimming with vigor.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Ghost Tunnel
programme.desc: A woman named Eroze who controls the tunnels that don't absorb any sound tries to destroy the 999. In order to save the 999 from destruction, Tetsuro goes with the woman.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: The Gold Legend Revived!
programme.desc: The 12 Gold Saints gave their lives to destroy the Wailing Wall to break the way for Seiya and the Saints in their battle against Hades in the Underworld.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: The Secret of Yggdrasil Revealed!
programme.desc: Aiolia defeats God Warrior Frodi. However, he passes out as the mysterious marks reappear. Lyfia runs about to save Aiolia, but she, too, collapses.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Gold vs. Gold: Clash of the Saints!
programme.desc: Scorpio Miro finally faces off against one of the God Warriors, Surt.
programme.sub-title: Gold vs. Gold: Clash of the Saints!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: The 7 God Warriors Assembled!
programme.desc: When Miro's life is at stake under Surt's malicious scheme, there emerges the strongest Gold Saint of Athena.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: God Cloth's Ultimate Power!
programme.desc: Learning of the God Cloths' powers from Shaka, Mu telepathically tells Aiolia and Lyfia.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Entering the 7 Chambers of Yggdrasil!
programme.desc: The Gold Saints are lured into Yggdrasil by Andreas after breaking Fimbulwinter.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Showdown: God Cloth vs. God Cloth!
programme.desc: A showdown of Gold Saints vs. God Warriors in the 7 chambers starts at last! Taurus Aldebaran faces God Warrior Hercules yet again.
programme.sub-title: Showdown: God Cloth vs. God Cloth!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Balder, the Man Chosen by the Gods!
programme.desc: Shaka, the man closest to the gods, faces God Warrior Balder in the chamber of light. He lives up to his reputation, but Balder subdues him with immense power!
programme.sub-title: Balder, the Man Chosen by the Gods!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Saga, the Unbreakable Bond of Brothers!
programme.desc: Sigmund, determined to avenge his younger brother Siegfried, is brushed aside by the immense power of the strongest Gold Saint Saga.
programme.sub-title: Saga, the Unbreakable Bond of Brothers!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Clash: Aiolia vs. Andreas!
programme.desc: Holding Lyfia's words close to heart, Aiolia finally faces Andreas! Andreas scornfully recounts how he manipulated Lyfia.

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: The Return of Loki, the False God of Asgard!
programme.desc: The ultimate forbidden attack Athena Exclamation by Mu, Saga, and Dohko annihilates Andreas! However, the evil fruit continues to grow, swallowing the Gold Saints!
programme.sub-title: The Return of Loki, the False God of Asgard!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: The Sacred Spear of Gungnir Reborn!
programme.desc: Empowered by his brother's determination, Lyfia's faith, and the Odin Robe, Aiolia, with Odin's sword and Draupnir in hand, faces off against Loki!
programme.sub-title: The Sacred Spear of Gungnir Reborn!

programme.title: Saint Seiya Soul of Gold: Let Our Prayers Be Heard! The Eternal Golden Legend!
programme.desc: All 12 Gold Saints gather since the Wailing Wall! With the purpose of reviving on earth close at heart, they face the false god Loki who's armed with the Spear of Gungnir!
programme.sub-title: Let Our Prayers Be Heard! The Eternal Golden Legend!

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Jolly Roger That Flutters Through Space
programme.desc: 2977 A.D. Mankind has developed the technology to head into space.
programme.sub-title: The Jolly Roger That Flutters Through Space

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Message from the Unknown
programme.desc: A transport ship unit is attacked by an unidentified flying object as it exits Planet No.7.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Woman Who Burns Like Paper
programme.desc: The town is sent into panic by the sphere that landed.
programme.sub-title: A Woman Who Burns Like Paper

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Under the Flag of Freedom!
programme.desc: After being invited to be a pirate by Harlock, Tadashi exits the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: To the Shores of Distant Star
programme.desc: Harlock tells Tadashi, upon joining his crew, to just loiter around and enjoy it, leaving Tadashi confused.
programme.sub-title: To the Shores of Distant Star

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Phantom Mazone
programme.desc: The Mazone soldier mentioned the name Queen Lafresia as she blew herself up.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Pyramid On the Ocean Floor
programme.desc: Upon seeing an odd looking formation from space, Harlock's crew heads to the Bermuda area.
programme.sub-title: The Pyramid On the Ocean Floor

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Queens Space Fleet
programme.desc: There are signals being emitted from the pennant and the pyramid.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Fearsome Plant Life Form
programme.desc: Dr. Zero analyzes the hair from the captured Mazone and sees their make-up is identical to sap found in plant life.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Advance On the Mystery Planet
programme.desc: Believing that all the jungles of Earth are inhabited by the Mazone, Harlock decides to return to the Pirate Island.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Brad moves a road-building camp deep in the Outback.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie's crew faces a difficult job transporting a large home in dangerous conditions.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's a rough ride for Steve as he travels from Perth into the red heart of Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie and Ashleigh hit house removal hell on a mud-bogged mission out of Brisbane.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross-country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge wrestles flooded roads to deliver fuel to farmers.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi risks a showdown with the law as he heads into south Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A Perth heavy haulage crew moves a huge pedestrian bridge.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve battles flooded highways when his truck breaks down, leaving him stranded.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A leaky fridge halts Woody's urgent frozen food delivery.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A delicate rescue operation to recover a 70-year-old World War II bomber.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kelly must transport 40 tonnes of grapes to a winery before they start fermenting.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Torrential rain plays havoc with Robbie Mackay's efforts to relocate a home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A cyclone threatens a tanker driver's delivery of hazardous chemicals to a mine site.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Richo owns a fleet of monster trucks that he has to get halfway across the continent.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In Perth, Steve Grahame is preparing for an epic journey.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark King has to haul a monster rig to a coal mine 700km away.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Dougal Brett's road trains have to haul 1,500 cattle to a market nearly 3,000km away.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent, Oscar and Davis go on a disastrous camping trip. Hank has a good hair day. Lacey and Wanda swap jobs.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank's tourism idea backfires. Dog River's popularity soars. Wanda gets a news gig.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar dislikes the lack of local content, sparking a competition for a new cable show.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen joins a spin class after Hank's comments. Brent avoids the new phone while Oscar overuses it.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey, Brent and Hank's golf game turns competitive. Oscar and Emma's new bed is problematic.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank's prank creates an unintended crop circle. Oscar's house painting drives him and Emma crazy.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's crush's phone number depends on Hank washing his truck. Brent questions his sense of smell.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Dog River searches for a gift for their Japanese sister city. Brent and Lacey go green.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar's strict rules as a substitute bus driver cause chaos. Hank advertises for the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets an unknown relative. Wanda shows off her math skills with Karen's help.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar's on a mission to catch a mouse in Corner Gas. Karen and Emma try to help Wanda with her injured back.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey's employee of the month program inspires Wanda, but Brent resists. Oscar writes the seniors' column.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank and Oscar's gumball business booms with Karen's help. Brent tries water divination.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent tries to stop Oscar from using his favorite word. A psychic predicts Lacey's future.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank and Davis oppose a call center. Wanda finds a new hobby in funerals.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey suspects counterfeit money. Hank's pink eye worries Brent and Wanda.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen and Davis bribe Oscar for Christmas gift info. Lacey doubts Wanda's friendship.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank bribes Brent and Davis to see "RaptorMan 2." Lacey joins a women's club.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen and Davis exploit Emma's cleaning triggers. Hank discovers a hidden world under the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar's get-rich-quick scheme is thwarted by Emma. Davis secretly borrows Brent's car.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's 40th birthday celebration includes a disastrous fireworks display. Karen mediates a cake-baking feud.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey unexpectedly wins an eating contest. Emma enjoys her new MP3 player, while Oscar takes advantage of it.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey sponsor Davis' soccer team. Karen's fear of driving leads Hank to chauffeur her.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's self-serve idea at Corner Gas backfires. Lacey's buffet is too successful.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's A/C setting irks Hank. Lacey and Wanda care for an abandoned pet.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen is wrongly accused of stealing. Wanda tries to guess Hank's email password.
programme.sub-title: All That and a Bag of Chips

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey is the sole guest at Oscar and Emma's hot tub party. Davis is Dog River's safety mascot.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank, Karen and Wanda try to break one another's New Year's resolutions.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent competes with Lacey and Hank to prove his Roughriders fandom. Davis teaches Wanda about mixed CDs.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's guitar teacher makes him feel uncool. Wanda adopts a secret identity.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Hank's comic book trip goes wrong. Lacey's donations become gifts.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar struggles with Emma's cat problem. Brent fakes an injury to teach Wanda a lesson.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis learns about sensitivity after offending Karen. Brent and Lacey challenge Hank's superstitions.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Dog River participates in Turn Off Your TV Week. Emma monitors the town's progress.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's new motorcycle brings a European flair to town. Lacey tricks Karen and Davis into helping her move.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis's robot purchase surprises him. Lacey tries to make Brent a food critic.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Hank's apple-stealing prank lands Hank in trouble. Oscar unexpectedly excels at charades.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On a brief stop for lunch, Ash, and his friends meet Todd Snap, a Pokémon photographer who has been trying to get a perfect shot of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Realizing that he hasn’t won any Gym badges for a while, Ash signs up for the Pokémon League Admissions Exam, a great chance to prove he’s got what it takes to become a Pokémon Master!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and the gang decide to check out a breeding center that they saw on a commercial. However, the center is a cover for a diabolical scheme from Team Rocket members Butch and Cassidy—old rivals of Jessie and James!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty and Jessie compete to be Queen of the Princess Festival! Ash and Brock lend Misty their Pokémon for the battle, and Jessie takes a licking despite a surprise Pokémon of her own.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: It’s Kids Day, and Ash and friends help some schoolchildren celebrate. Team Rocket spoils the fun by grabbing a kid instead of Pikachu. In a shocking turn of events, Meowth becomes a good guy…or does he?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Cinnabar Island, where Ash hopes to win the Volcano Badge. A strange character offers riddles about how to find the Gym, where Ash and Pikachu have a fiery battle with a Pokémon they’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash has finally located the Gym, suspended above a pool of molten lava! This battle for the Volcano Badge can only be won by a strong Fire-type Pokémon, so Ash must rely on his misbehaving Charizard.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: While Ash and the gang hurry to catch the last ferry off Cinnabar Island, they get sidetracked by a group of Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise that need assistance!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty's Horsea desperately needs exercise, so the gang decides to take it to her sisters' Gym in Cerulean City. There, she learns that her sisters are planning an exciting underwater ballet.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, and Misty get sidetracked on their way to Viridian City when all of their belongings mysteriously disappear. While searching for their missing things, they find themselves mixed up in a close encounter that’s really out of this world!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes make their way to Viridian City, where Ash hopes to earn the Earth Badge. They get to the Gym just in time to see his rival, Gary, being defeated by an unknown Pokémon—and Gary insists that it's evil!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: On their way back to Pallet Town, our heroes encounter a runaway Mr. Mime. Ash disguises himself as another Mr. Mime so he can get close. When Team Rocket strikes, will they catch the right Mr. Mime?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves at a fork in the road and decide to climb a steep and dangerous mountain. Pikachu gets lost, and they must all work together to find it, stay warm, and weather a storm.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: On a visit to Professor Oak’s house, Ash runs into Gary, and they talk about the upcoming Pokémon League. Professor Oak says they should learn from each other rather than competing, and that teamwork pays off when Team Rocket attacks!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and his mother take a vacation to Seafoam Island. While he's there, he's looking for the programmer of the Pokédex to learn about the peculiar evolution of SlowPoké. Team Rocket's bumbling brings to light this surprising mystery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash wipes out during a surfing attempt, Victor rescues him and tells him about Humungadunga, a giant wave that sweeps through every 20 years. Can Ash and Pikachu give Victor the confidence he needs to catch the giant wave?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Back in Pallet Town, Ash, and friends meet Florinda, who works at the local nursery. Her Gloom won't evolve, so she’s afraid she's not training it properly. When Team Rocket attacks, everyone sees just how strong a Pokémon can become!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Everyone wants to become the star when a famous director arrives in town! Ash, Brock, Misty, and Team Rocket are working hard to ensure their Pokémon will be the ones to star opposite Wigglytuff in his movie as he solely desires them.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When the gang attends the premiere of 'Pokémon in Love,' Meowth looks back on his painful past. He shares the story of his life before Team Rocket, including how he learned to walk and talk like a human.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: With only three weeks left before the Pokémon League competition, Ash, Brock, and Misty head up to Mt. Hideaway to find one of the Elite Four. They're after Pokémon training tips, but they discover a land of overgrown Onix instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: While Ash and Brock train for the Pokémon League, they uncover a hidden temple containing Pokémon fossils. Misty remembers a hidden city where people built temples to honor Pokémon. Could they have stumbled upon the ancient city of Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes are headed to the Pokémon League tournament at the Indigo Plateau when they meet another Trainer going their way. Unfortunately, all of his Gym badges have been stolen, so he can't compete…unless he takes Ash's badges instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Pokémon League is about to begin with the ceremonial lighting of the torch, which carries a flame from the Legendary Pokémon Moltres. Of course, Team Rocket tries to steal it!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: It's the first day of the Pokémon League, and when Ash's friends learn his first battle will be held on the Water Field, they're full of advice!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: As the Pokémon League continues, Ash battles on the Rock Field and has a run-in with Team Rocket after they set up a fake Pokémon Center to lure unwary Trainers!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash faces his toughest opponent yet on the Grass Field at the Pokémon League! Are he and his Bulbasaur ready to take on his opponent and her powerful Scyther?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash meets a like-minded Trainer named Richie at the Pokémon League, the two boys quickly become close friends—and so do their two Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and Richie will be paired up against each other in the fifth round of the Pokémon League! Can their friendship hold up during this significant battle?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Misty, and Brock are in the stands cheering for Richie as the Pokémon League winds down, and then they march together in the closing ceremonies. It's an experience that will stick with Ash throughout his journey as a Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and friends return to Pallet Town for a hero's welcome, only to be sent on another journey right away! Professor Oak is seeking a mysterious-looking Poké Ball, and he asks Ash, Brock, and Misty to find it for him.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for their long journey to Valencia Island to bring back a mysterious Poké Ball for Professor Oak. When Ash wins a free blimp ride, it seems their travel woes are no more—but who's flying this thing?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After making a crash landing onto Valencia Island, our heroes get directions to Professor Ivy’s laboratory, where the mysterious Poké Ball is being held. Brock is delighted to discover that the professor and her colleagues are fellow Pokémon breeders.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Thanks to Jigglypuff's sleep-inducing song, the blimp carrying Ash and Misty back home goes off course and crashes on an island, where they meet a new friend named Tracey while trying to help a lost Lapras.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to explore the Orange Islands, and Ash is determined to qualify for the Orange League! He soon learns that the Orange Crew challenges are a little different from the usual Gym battles.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash, Misty, and Tracey arrive at Mandarin Island, Pikachu and Togepi turn against them and join a group of other angry Pokémon. When the misbehaving Pokémon disappear, Officer Jenny informs them that dozens of Pokémon have been reported missing!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash discovers a message in a bottle, which prompts our heroes to embark on a new journey on Sunburst Island and a quest for a highly elusive Onix!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves on Pinkan Island, home to numerous strangely colored Pokémon. Ash and Tracey are fascinated by these pink Pokémon…and so are the Team Rocket trio!
