programme.title: Catfish UK: Esther & Theo
programme.desc: Esther's finally found her match in Theo. But he always refuses to video call. So it's up to Julia and Oobah to find out if Theo is who he says he is. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Angelica & Jeroen
programme.desc: Angelica's been speaking to Jeroen online for three and a half years. After several failed attempts to meet, she's now desperate to find out if Jeroen is real? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Levi & Will
programme.desc: Levi is convinced Will is his dream man and broke up with his boyfriend so they could be together. After always cancelling on Levi, Oobah and Nella suspect something fishy is going on. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Jordan & Austin
programme.desc: After two years of chatting, Jordan believes Austin is the one. But every time they arrange to meet, Austin cancels. Can Julie and Oobah finally bring them together? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Leanne & Jamie
programme.desc: Leanne is desperate to find out if online love Jamie is her Mr Right. After cancelling on her numerous times, Leanne wants Oobah and Nella to investigate and finally bring them face to face. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Cole, Abbie & The Fanpage
programme.desc: Cole and Abbie keep being sent anonymous creepy gifts to their home and their relationship is now at breaking point. Julie and Oobah head to Scotland to try and help save their marriage. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Emma & Harlin
programme.desc: Julie and Oobah uncover more than they were expecting, as their search to help Emma find her online love Harlin takes a sinister turn. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Horses For Courses
programme.desc: Amber goes dating, Mia struggles with night feeds, Chloe takes Marley to a modelling session, Dylan buys Megan a horse and Naomi and Raphael's love life hits a rocky patch. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Trouble And Paradise
programme.desc: Chloe turns 18 but rows with Jordan on her big night out. Meanwhile, Megan and Dylan travel to Spain, Mia confronts Maggie, and Amber gets ready for the Christening - but there are tears. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Outfits, Arguments And Ultimatums
programme.desc: Chloe and Jordan go to Spain, but love stays at home. Amber rows with Ste, Mia spends Father's Day in a huff, Dylan hates Megan's 18th birthday outfit and Naomi gives Raphael an ultimatum. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: It's All Over
programme.desc: There's more drama in store for the teen mums as Mia faces off with Erin, Amber and Ste try counselling, Chloe and Jordan take a break and Megan and Dylan's engagement party ends in tears. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: The Future's Bright
programme.desc: Megan wants a new baby, Mia has her first night out since Marliya was born and Chloe makes a decision about Jordan. Naomi gets mad when an unexpected guest shows up at Kya's party. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: New Beginnings
programme.desc: While Megan drops a baby bombshell on Dylan, Naomi moves on from Raphael. Meanwhile, Chloe and Jordan go house hunting, Mia sets her mind on marriage, and Ste tells Amber he's found love. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Arrival
programme.desc: Brand new Teen Mom UK is back, and mums Chloe, Mia, Megan and Amber are being joined by a sassy newcomer. Get ready for tears, tantrums and true love with our tenacious Brit teen girls. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Relationship Woes
programme.desc: New mum Sassi chooses a surprising new career, Chloe clashes with her mum, Mia and Megan have relationship misery and for Amber, love is in the air. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Neil & Jasmin
programme.desc: Neil has been chatting to Jasmin for 3 years and she's stood him up 13 times. So it's up to Julie and Oobah to find out if the person Neil has fallen for...is real? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Jerry & Karla
programme.desc: Jerry needs help meeting his first love Karla. Karla claims to have already met Jerry but refuses to talk to him on the phone. Can Oobah and Nella find out if Karla is who she says she is? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Esther & Theo
programme.desc: Esther's finally found her match in Theo. But he always refuses to video call. So it's up to Julia and Oobah to find out if Theo is who he says he is. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Angelica & Jeroen
programme.desc: Angelica's been speaking to Jeroen online for three and a half years. After several failed attempts to meet, she's now desperate to find out if Jeroen is real? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Levi & Will
programme.desc: Levi is convinced Will is his dream man and broke up with his boyfriend so they could be together. After always cancelling on Levi, Oobah and Nella suspect something fishy is going on. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Precious Angels
programme.desc: A report on the brutal murders in a Dallas, Texas suburb of Darlie and Darin Routier’s two sons -- Devon, 6 and Damon, 5. Darlie who claims that the boys were killed by an intruder, suffered serious knife wounds to her throat.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Millionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Secret
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Kalamazoo, Michigan's cold case unit's investigation of the September 1994 disappearance of Khristine Smith, a seemingly happy wife and mother.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 1
programme.desc: Fred Jablin, a devoted father was gunned down in his driveway. His ex-wife, Piper was the prime suspect. Circumstantial evidence, including an airline ticket and two wigs indicated that Piper had masqueraded as her older sister and killed her husband.
programme.sub-title: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 2
programme.desc: Fred Jablin, a devoted father was gunned down in his driveway. His ex-wife, Piper was the prime suspect. Circumstantial evidence, including an airline ticket and two wigs indicated that Piper had masqueraded as her older sister and killed her husband.
programme.sub-title: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours: Scared to Death
programme.desc: Police Lt. Jim Barton found his wife, Vickie, murdered execution-style on their farm in Warren County, Ohio, in 1995. With limited physical evidence and no suspects, the investigation lay dormant for nine years until a tip opened the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Spies, Lies and Secrets
programme.desc: A report about the death of Shane Todd, a brilliant, high-tech engineer at a Singapore company who, according to his parents, was murdered because he was unwilling to share secrets that could harm the United States.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In 2014, a New Orleans filmmaker becomes a suspect in the 1996 murder of an Idaho teen after a search of a public DNA database yields a partial match.

programme.title: 48 Hours: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal
programme.desc: Investigators ask for the public's help to solve the 2008 murder of Kay Wenal, a former model found dead in her home in Georgia.
programme.sub-title: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ambushed
programme.desc: A man helps a new detective figure out who murdered his father.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Decades of Deceit
programme.desc: An Internet-savvy investigator works to solve a decades-old murder case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction
programme.desc: The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours: Getting Away with Murder?
programme.desc: A report on families who have experienced the violent death of a loved one and believe they know the identity of the killer but lack evidence to back the charge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Why Did Josh Kill?
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Maddie Clifton of Jacksonville, Florida went outside to play and never came back. Seven days later a city-wide search led to the home of Josh Phillips, a 14-year-old neighbor, where Maddie's body was found under the boy's waterbed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family Torn Apart
programme.desc: The murdered body of Bob Dorotik, a engineer and father of three, was found by a mountain road near his home in the foothills of San Diego, Ca. Despite her denial of any involvement, Jane, Dorotik’s wife of 30 years, was arrested for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a woman's husband reveals he is not the first man she married who died under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Time to Kill
programme.desc: 17-year-old Sterling Barber was accused of murdering Gerald Douglas Wyatt, a church deacon. The Carnesville, Georgia teenager claimed that he acted in self-defense because Wyatt, known to be a predator, was trying to molest him.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Creepshow 2
programme.desc: Three more bone-chilling tales that include a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and a hitchhiker who wants revenge and will not die. Starring:George Kennedy, Lois Chiles, Domenick John

programme.title: Dog Soldiers
programme.desc: A routine military exercise turns into a nightmare in the Scotland wilderness.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: Horror master Wes Craven directs this story about a family that moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club. Starring: Robert Urich, Joanna Cassidy, Susan Lucci

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: A young couple is trapped in a remote town where a dangerous religious cult of children believe everyone over the age of 18 must be killed. Starring: Peter Horton, Linda Hamilton, R.G. Armstrong, John Franklin, Courtney Gains

programme.title: Calvaire
programme.desc: The shocking cult classic is back. A stranded singer falls victim to a dangerously unhinged innkeeper determined to keep him captive.

programme.title: Halloween Night
programme.desc: Halloween Night, 1982, an inmate of a maximum security facility escapes after murdering two guards. Upon returning to the house where he was born, he goes on a killing spree that will make him Southern California's greatest mass murderer.

programme.title: Calvaire
programme.desc: The shocking cult classic is back. A stranded singer falls victim to a dangerously unhinged innkeeper determined to keep him captive.

programme.title: Return to Horror High
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a series of murders occurred at Crippen High. Years later, the now-abandoned site is being used as the set for a film when an uninvited guest begins to terrorize the crew. Starring: George Clooney, Lori Lethin, Brendan Hughes, Alex Rocco

programme.title: The Vampire Bat
programme.desc: When corpses drained of blood begin to show up in an European village, town elders suspect a vampire on the loose.

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Transylvania 6-5000
programme.desc: Two tabloid reporters (Jeff Goldblum, Ed Begley Jr.) go to a strange land to check on rumors of monsters running amok.

programme.title: Castle Freak
programme.desc: A man struggles to save his family from the strange and deadly occurrences in the castle they've inherited.Uknown to them a hideous creature lurks within its walls.

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
programme.desc: An American man unwittingly gets involved with French werewolves who are able to transform at will.

programme.title: The Day of the Triffids
programme.desc: After an unusual meteor shower leaves most of the human population blind, a merchant navy officer must find a way to conquer tall, aggressive plants which are feeding on people and animals. Starring: Howard Keel, Nicole Maurey, Janette Scott

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A young officer in Napoleon's army pursues a mysterious woman to the castle of an elderly Baron.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Family Secret
programme.desc: Scott's family album of werewolves gets mixed up in the back of Mick's car. He and his friend Stiles hunt it down in order to protect the Howard family secret.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: The Werewolf Buster
programme.desc: A werewolf hunter comes to the town of Wolverton. Scott and his family must find and warn Grandpa, who is hunting turkey in the woods.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Shopworn Wolf
programme.desc: Scott tries to earn money to pay for an electric guitar. He helps at his dad's shop, but finds raising money is a lot more difficult than he expected.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Scott and his family mysteriously become unable to control their wolf-outs and worry that the town monster, that has been covered in recent news reports, is actually them.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Up A Family Tree
programme.desc: Scott's werewolf family comes to town for a family reunion. Scott's cousin, Eva, goes on a date with Mick, and it's Scott's responsibility to protect the family secret before it's revealed that Eva is a werewolf.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Grandpa's in the Doghouse
programme.desc: Pam's sheepdog, Daisy, gets loose and chases Ballard the cat. When Mr. Conroy is called to catch Daisy, he bumps into Grandpa, switches glasses with him, and takes him to the pound instead of Daisy.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Wolf Pride
programme.desc: A film about a mean and violent werewolf is shot in Wolverton. Outraged by the poor misrepresentation of werewolves, Scott decides to be a stuntman in order to change the horror film into a comedy.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Wolf of My Dreams
programme.desc: Scott becomes infatuated with Shayna the She Wolf, a T.V. personality who he believes to be a real teen wolf like himself. He and Stiles decide to travel to Hollywood and find her.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba
programme.desc: Scorpius has betrayed the crew. Now they're all captured. Their plan failed, the crew has little choice but to help Scorpius's true agenda.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E22 - Bad Timing
programme.desc: With their Crystherium stores low, the Scarrans must travel to Earth through a wormhole as those flowers grow there.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: John Crichton and Aeryn anticipate the birth of their child, only to get caught in the middle of a war that threatens millions of lives.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: Determined not to let his child be born into a world at war, John Crichton puts himself at the center of the conflict.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E1 - Premiere
programme.desc: Astronaut John Crichton attempts to propel his module at high speeds but is hit by a radiation wave and is sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E2 - Exodus From Genesis
programme.desc: A locator beacon, automatically broadcasting its exact location to any Peacekeeper forces in the area.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E2 - Exodus From Genesis

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E3 - Back And Back And Back To The Future
programme.desc: The crew rescues a scientist and his assistant from a disintegrating ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E3 - Back And Back And Back To The Future

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E4 - Throne For A Loss
programme.desc: Rygel is captured and held for ransom by some bounty hunters.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E4 - Throne For A Loss

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E5 - PK Tech Girl
programme.desc: After finding the legendary Peacekeeper battleship, Zelbinion, dead in space Crichton, Aeryn, and D'Argo find a Peacekeeper tech under Crais's command.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E5 - PK Tech Girl

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E6 - Thank God It's Friday, Again
programme.desc: The crew visits a planet full of happy workers. Soon D'Argo and Zhaan start working and refuse to return to the ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E6 - Thank God It's Friday, Again

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E7 - I, E.T.
programme.desc: A peacekeeper beacon goes off and Moya has to land on an alien planet to prevent its signal being intercepted and Moya being discovered.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic
programme.desc: Crichton's spirit is captured by Maldis. The sorcerer thrives on vengeance and hate, he brings Crais's spirit down. And the two spirits battle.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist
programme.desc: A scientist extracts DNA from several of Moya's crew, promising them that he would be able to use it to find the location of their home planets.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret
programme.desc: During routine searches for Peacekeeper beacons, D'Argo falls down a chute, destroys a Peacekeeper shield and gets ejected into open space.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby
programme.desc: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them. Their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
programme.desc: Chiana leaves Moya and goes to 'grave planet' populated by reckless thrill seekers who play dangerous and life-threatening games.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
